name: Superpowers
tagline: Agentic skills framework and software development methodology.
description: Superpowers bundles a complete software development methodology — brainstorm, spec, plan, TDD, subagent-driven execution, code review, merge — as a set of composable skills that auto-trigger at the right moment. Built by Jesse Vincent.
author: Jesse Vincent (obra)

install.manual: See README for each agent's install flow

name: Anthropic Agent Skills
tagline: Anthropic's official open-source skills library.
description: The official public repository for Claude Agent Skills, maintained by Anthropic. Includes canvas design, document generation (docx, pdf, pptx, xlsx), frontend design, MCP builder, skill creator, and more.
author: Anthropic

install.manual: Clone the repo and copy individual skills into your project's .claude/skills/ directory, or install via the official Claude plugin marketplace.

name: Canvas Design
tagline: Create polished visual designs and graphics directly in Claude.
description: Official Anthropic skill for generating SVG/canvas-based visual designs — posters, diagrams, illustrations — with consistent style and typography.
author: Anthropic

install.manual: Copy skills/canvas-design/ from anthropics/skills into your .claude/skills/ directory.

name: DOCX Generator

description: Official Anthropic skill for programmatically authoring .docx files — headings, tables, styles, embedded images — without needing Word installed.

install.manual: Copy skills/docx/ from anthropics/skills into your .claude/skills/ directory.

author: Anthropic

install.manual: Copy skills/pptx/ from anthropics/skills into your .claude/skills/ directory.

name: Web Artifacts Builder

name: UI UX Pro Max
tagline: Design intelligence for building professional UI/UX across multiple platforms.
description: An AI skill that provides design intelligence — 161 reasoning rules, 67 UI styles, and a design-system generator — for building professional UI/UX across Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and more. Includes a CLI (uipro-cli) for cross-agent install.
author: NextLevelBuilder

install.cursor:
npm install -g uipro-cli
uipro init --ai cursor
install.manual:
npm install -g uipro-cli
uipro init --ai claude        # or --ai cursor | --ai windsurf
uipro init --ai claude --global  # install globally to ~/.claude/skills/

name: Awesome Agent Skills
